title: 3 Pairs QEARSAFETY General Purpose Microfoam Breathable Nitrile Rubber Palm Coated Work Gloves, Knitted Elastic Liner, Abrasion, Grip, Dexterity,Anti-Hand Fatigue, 8/M
features: 15 gauge grey fine spandex/nylon knitted liner
Palm microfoam nitrile coated for great dexterity, grip, abrasion, and breathable
It greatly reduces the hand fatigue for long time wearing a glove for our hands.
It's suitable for slightly oily environment handing.
description: Product Description This glove is a general work safety glove. It greatly reduces the hand fatigue for long time wearing a glove for our hands. It combines comfort, dexterity, snug fit, breathable, abrasion, grip- all in one. Description QearSafety General Work Safety Gloves Package 3 pairs per a pack Size Available 7/S: in red color binding, 8/M: in yellow color binding, 9/L: in brown color binding, 10/XL: in black color binding EN388:2016 4121X
